message.goose_curios.nine_calamities.nee: You must use a Dire Hexcraft Wand to deal damage
tooltip.goose_curios.nine_calamities.lor: One wand stirs calamity, one curse buries kingdoms; all arts beneath heaven bow before my darkness.
tooltip.goose_curios.nine_calamities.oat: Yet to wield such wicked power, a fated oath must be sworn:
From now on, only a Dire Hexcraft Wand may serve as your weapon.
tooltip.goose_curios.nine_calamities.eff: Effect 1: Each unique Dire Hexcraft Wand in the hotbar grants damage bonus
- The first wand grants %s%% damage bonus; each later type decreases by %s%%
Effect 2: Casting a focus with the same school as the current wand grants damage bonus
- Effective wand count × %s%%, lasts %s seconds; different schools stack and refresh duration
tooltip.goose_curios.nine_calamities.cur: Current bonus details are only shown in a player's inventory.
hud.goose_curios.nine_calamities.title: Nine Demons: Nine Calamities
tooltip.goose_curios.cyber_psychosis.lor: You are not the gun; how could you know where it points?
You are not the skull; how could you know where it begins?
tooltip.goose_curios.cyber_psychosis.eff: While worn, TACZ headshots no longer depend on hit location.
Each damage instance has a %s%% chance to make the world admit: this is the head.
If denied, the next chance increases by %s%%, up to %s%%.
If admitted, the chance returns to %s%%.
If no gunshot speaks for %s seconds, the delusion cools.
tooltip.goose_curios.bond_will.lore.2: Elegance is not etiquette; it is the silence before the shot.
tooltip.goose_curios.bond_will.effect.1: §bArticle I: When crouched, the world forgets you exist.
§7→ Gain concealment effect while aiming with gun
tooltip.goose_curios.bond_will.effect.2: §6Article II: Every second of silence is ammunition for the next shot.
§7→ Starts after §e%s seconds §7out of combat, §c%s/s§7, capped at §e%s
tooltip.goose_curios.bond_will.effect.3: §3Article III: Charged to the limit, aim locked—time stands still for you.
tooltip.goose_curios.bond_will.effect.4: §9Article IV: The gunshot is the alarm; once it rings, you are no longer flawless.
§7→ After entering combat, §cdamage reduced by %s §7until out of combat again
gui.goose_curios.bond_will_settings.dist: Controls screen distortion during time-stop phase
gui.goose_curios.bond_will_settings.shot: Controls the extra sound played on full-charge shot
Controls the impact visual on full-charge shot
gui.goose_curios.bond_will_settings.hitb: Shows entity hitbox outlines while aiming
